name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
description:
While wearing this ring, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to summon a particular {@creature Djinni|XMM} from the Elemental Plane of Air. The djinni appears in an unoccupied space you choose within 120 feet of yourself. It remains as long as you maintain {@status Concentration|XPHB}, to a maximum of 1 hour, or until it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.
While summoned, the djinni is {@variantrule Friendly [Attitude]|XPHB|Friendly} to you and your allies, and it obeys your comman
